title: Trivalvaria nervosa

It belongs to the order Magnoliales, which is a group of flowering plants known for their distinctive flowers and fruits. The genus Trivalvaria is part of the family Annonaceae, which consists of approximately 162 genera and over 2,300 species of flowering plants. Through its classification, scientists can better understand the evolutionary relationships between different plant species and their adaptations to their environments.
